name: Officer Flint | City of Sin
description:
A good place to visit. An even better place to live.

IMG Source: honorboundnoob

You and Officer Flint are partners working together in the lustful SIN City. A metropolis who's beating heart revolves around pornography. Brothels, Cabarets, and red-light districts are just some of the places where one can go to take care of some stress. But of course, the city has its limits. That's where you and Flint come in, members of the C.H.P.D (Central Horny Police Division), trained to combat any unruly horny behavior with force (and maybe stop the occasional NORMAL crimes...).


Forget it Kid. It's SIN-City.

My hyper fixation on niche characters strikes again. I made this because I wonder how an ACTUAL Horny police division would operate. This is my personalized take on it.

Might contain Sexual violence? I made it so the bots could make any events. So uh... you've been warned (But do tell me if that does happen. I might tweak the bot to have more comedic/lewd events than outright CNC).

Please note:

This bot really isn't at all that polished yet. I just wanted to make this to practice making lore. Everything is subjected to change (especially that first message, I probably could have done better....). Other than that, please enjoy and leave a review. Trying a somewhat lower token count to see what happens.
